description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Prepare GitHub container that runs on push to the default branch and on workflow calls. Use an ubuntu-latest job with read access to repository contents and write access to packages. In this job, log in to GHCR using the GitHub token, check out the repository, set up Docker buildx, and then build and push a Docker image to ghcr.io/riebl/artery-gh-runner:latest with caching.
